name: Trifle (Raspberry.custard Bowl)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1/2 cup sugar, cornstarch, and salt in a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Gradually stir in milk and wine. Heat to boiling over medium heat, stirring constantly.
3. Boil and stir for 1 minute. Gradually stir at least half of the hot mixture into egg yolks; stir back into the hot mixture in the pan.
4. Continue boiling and stirring for 1 more minute. Remove from heat.
5. Stir in butter and vanilla until butter melts. Cover and refrigerate for at least 3 hours.
6. Soak almonds in hot water for about 3 minutes, then drain.
7. Carefully cut almonds lengthwise into halves with a sharp knife.
8. Split ladyfingers lengthwise into halves and spread each half with raspberry preserves.
9. Layer the mixture in a 2-quart serving bowl: 1/4 of the ladyfingers (cut sides up), 1/4 cup of halved almonds, half of the raspberries, and half of the pudding; repeat.
10. Arrange remaining ladyfingers around the edge of the bowl with cut sides toward the center. Gently ease them down into the pudding about 1 inch so they remain upright.
11. Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes before serving.
12. Beat cream and sugar in a chilled small mixer bowl until stiff; spread over the top of the dessert.
13. Garnish with remaining almonds and reserved raspberries.
